vocab.meaning: một kho tàng thông tin/kiến thức
vocab.example: In my country, news portals are a mine of information for anyone who wants to keep abreast of local and global affairs.

vocab.meaning: lan truyền cực nhanh (như cháy rừng)
vocab.example: Social media sites are incredibly popular because any piece of news can spread like wildfire within minutes.
Short-video platforms are currently all the rage among the younger generation in Vietnam.

vocab.meaning: huyết mạch/phần quan trọng nhất của cái gì
vocab.example: E-commerce websites have become the lifeblood of the modern retail industry in my country.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.meaning: rất đắt đỏ (thường dùng để so sánh sự tiện lợi của web)
vocab.example: Educational websites are popular because buying physical textbooks can cost an arm and a leg compared to digital resources.

vocab.meaning: kế sinh nhai/nhu cầu thiết yếu hàng ngày
vocab.example: For freelancers, professional networking sites are their bread and butter for finding new clients.
Comparison websites are widely used because they help shoppers find deals that won't break the bank.

vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: Entertainment and gaming websites allow users to have a whale of a time after a stressful day at work.

vocab.meaning: vật lộn để tồn tại (về tài chính/kiến thức)
vocab.example: Many people use financial advisory websites to learn how to keep their head above water during economic downturns.

vocab.meaning: phần lớn nhất, tỷ trọng cao nhất
vocab.example: Facebook and YouTube still command the lion's share of daily web traffic in the domestic market.
